Stay Mikado is a modern island guesthouse in the Maldives, perfect for travellers seeking authentic local living with comfort. Offering warm hospitality, cosy rooms, and easy access to island excursions, it’s the ideal base to explore local culture, vibrant reefs, and pristine shores. Whether for a short escape or a long retreat, every stay is designed to be personal, relaxed, and memorable.

Thimarafushi is a prominent inhabited island located in Thaa Atoll, approximately 215 kilometers south of Malé. Known as an important commercial and transport hub within the atoll, the island features its own domestic airport, offering convenient connectivity to the capital and surrounding islands.

Surrounded by crystal-clear lagoons, vibrant coral reefs, and beautiful natural scenery, Thimarafushi offers visitors an authentic Maldivian island experience. The island is home to a warm and welcoming community where locals are known for their friendliness, hospitality, and rich cultural traditions.

Thaa Atoll is well known for its excellent surf breaks, vibrant marine life, and remarkable dive sites filled with colorful coral reefs. Combining accessibility, natural beauty, and a vibrant local community, Thimarafushi continues to grow as one of the Maldives’ emerging destinations for surfers, divers, anglers, and travelers looking to experience the true charm of island life.
Discover the perfect accommodation for your Maldives getaway. Choose from our carefully curated room types, each offering a unique blend of comfort, style, and stunning island views.

‘Stay Madivaru’ the perfect getaway vacations for both introverts and extroverts with highly versatile activities carried out and incredible services provided, planned and operated by stay islands private limited.

‘Stay Madivaru’ is a stunning locally build 25m teakwood boat which has been completely refurbished in 2015, bringing out a true uniqueness to this boat by enlightening the modern gestures assuring complete comfort to the passengers from all over the world.

Laying under the sun, soaking in the bright rays along with the luxury cravings all in one could be experienced at ‘Stay Madivaru’ which boasts a vast saloon, bar dining area and also a sundeck. The saloon is furnished with comfortable dinette sofas perfect to lounge the day away. The sundeck is situated above the saloon, furnished with both sundeck chairs and sun beds, ideal for all sun lovers.
The Exotic Experience
of the Maldivian Ocean

The Maldives is the place on earth where the sand is as white as the snow, the shorelines as blue as a turquoise gem stone, most importantly a homeland to hundreds of species of fishes, including tiny vibrant reef fishes, moray eels and types of tunas. Oceans covered with dense coral reefs featuring a fantasy world under the water. The Indian Ocean surrounding the Maldivian archipelago is full of activities, such as scuba diving, fishing, cruising, and surfing. Cruising on a boat is the most effective way to experience it all. While all islands have their own reef to explore, there are also more obscure experiences to be had, such as diving to see the whale sharks or giant manta rays in certain parts of the ocean.

Step aboard Stay Madivaru and unwind in thoughtfully designed cabins, crafted for comfort on the open water. Each cabin offers a cosy, well-equipped space to relax between adventures. Whether you’re solo, with a partner, or in a group, every cabin guarantees a restful and memorable stay at sea.
Ready to experience the Maldives with Stay Islands? Let us handle every detail, from island retreats to open-sea adventures. Your perfect escape starts here.
